summary: Baseline Next.js site was generated and validated at build/runtime level. Full production readiness remains blocked by integration and quality-gate gaps.
completed: Core pages implemented for emergency, quote, services, areas, maintenance, reviews
Floating contact dock with call, WhatsApp, AI chat wired
API routes implemented: chat, quote, contact, leads, maintenance-signup, coverage-check, health
Frontend artifact bundle created under docs/frontend

blockers.detail: Not all planned integrations are fully wired (Sanity, Resend, PostHog, Sentry, Turnstile, Maps).
Critical path test coverage is not complete yet (no E2E suite for all declared P0/P1 routes).
Form handlers are implemented but not yet mapped to full Zod schemas and env validation matrix from plan.

next_execution_targets: Integrate Sanity content layer and dynamic data for services/areas/blog/reviews
Replace placeholder API logic with Resend/OpenAI/Turnstile production integrations
Implement env validation for full plan var set in lib/env.ts
Add Playwright E2E critical paths and pass gate
Add route-level schema metadata and JSON-LD generators
